_comment: This is a SAMPLE file for testing the frontend. Replace with the output of generate_quiz.py.

meta.note: Candidate positions are inferred from public forum transcripts. Each position is accompanied by a verbatim quote from the candidate. This tool is for informational purposes only.

questions.question: The district should offer Algebra I to all 8th graders who want it.

Candidate A.quote: Every student who is ready for Algebra I should have access to it in 8th grade, full stop.

Candidate B.quote: I support expanding access to Algebra I but we need to make sure teachers are prepared.

Candidate C.quote: We should focus on making sure all students are proficient in 7th grade math first.

Candidate D.quote: Rushing students into algebra before they're ready does more harm than good.

questions.question: High schools should start no earlier than 8:30 AM.

Candidate A.quote: The research on teen sleep is compelling. I'd support a later start if logistics allow.

Candidate B.quote: Sleep deprivation is a public health crisis among teenagers. 8:30 should be the floor.

Candidate C.quote: I understand the sleep science but this affects working families and childcare in real ways.

questions.question: The district should increase its budget for special education services.

Candidate A.quote: We are legally and morally obligated to fully fund special education. It's non-negotiable.

Candidate B.quote: Special education funding is one of the clearest areas where we've underinvested.

Candidate D.quote: I support more resources for special education but we need to audit current spending first.
